name: costgate
description: Gate your MCP. Cut your bill.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @costgate/schema && npm run build -w @costgate/probe
scripts.docker:build: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm dev npm run build
scripts.docker:gate: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm go go build -o packages/gate/bin/costgate-gate ./packages/gate/cmd/costgate-gate
scripts.docker:shell: docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml run --rm dev bash
scripts.docker:test: docker compose -f docker-compose.test.yml --profile test run --rm test-runner
